remarkList.remark: Petrobras declare 11 month option, new hire rate of $14,900 from 28 July

Delivered:           28th July 2018 

•	period:                24 mths opt 11 mos +/-30 days inchopt

•	hire:                      USD $14,000 pd / USD $14,900 pd
                                
•	commission:      3,25% total. 2pct to Stenabulk P&C and 1.25pct broker commission payable to Brazilship.

•	delivery:              dlosp 1 sp Brazil or UKC or Med or Caribs or USG or USAC in Owners option

•	redelivery:         dlosp 1 sp Brazil or UKC or Med or Caribs or USG or USAC in Charterers option. 

•	earliest/latest redelivery: 24 mos Firm Period = earliest June 28 2020
Anniversary July 28 2020    latest August 27 2020

Opt 11 mos = earliest May 29 2021    anniversary June 28 2021   latest July 28 2021
Vsl delivered to Petrobras on 28 July 2018 10:18 LT/ 14:18 GMT at Manaus

offhireList.remark: Unplanned - Suspended discharging as per shore request due to one of on-signing crew members have been sent to doctor for COVID-19 test as a preventive measure.
Unplanned - Awaiting for port health authorities to clear the vessel
Planned - delivery to new buyers at Cape Town
